presets.name: Datadog Teams Sync
presets.description: Reads JustIAM app mappings (variable_name=teams) as the source of truth, creates/deletes matching Datadog teams, and keeps SAML authn_mappings in sync so team membership is propagated via SAML assertion.

presets.name: Datadog Roles Sync
presets.description: Reads JustIAM app mappings (variable_name=roles) as the source of truth and keeps Datadog SAML role authn_mappings in sync. Managed roles (Datadog built-ins) are never created or deleted.
